title: Route Helper - Retailo Technologies
description: Overhauled route planning with real-time dashboards, cut planning time by 51%
problem: Retailo Technologies needed a more efficient route planning system that could handle complex logistics operations while providing real-time insights to reduce planning time and improve delivery accuracy.
whatIDid: Spent time with operations teams, structured information architecture for complex data, and created interactive prototypes that reduced route planning time.
overview: Creating an intuitive dashboard for logistics route planning.
goal: Reduce planning time while improving accuracy and team visibility.

content.text: Transformed manual, spreadsheet-based planning into a real-time dashboard with automated metrics and clear priorities.

results: Planning time reduced dramatically with better collaboration between ops and sales teams.
